evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Safeguard data integrity through robust testing frameworks, documentation, and data quality practices
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Testing frameworks, data integrity, and documentation dominate despite one 'Deliver at pace' cultural value phrase, giving rigour a clear majority.
evidence.domain_risk: Hello, we're IG Group. We are a publicly-traded FTSE250 FinTech company who run mobile, web and desktop platforms that help our clients trade stocks & shares, leveraged products, Futures & Options and Crypto
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: A publicly-traded FinTech trading platform for leveraged products and crypto is a default-high-risk regulated financial sector.
evidence.collaboration_width: data engineers; analytics engineers; data scientists; business stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity: As a member of the Analytics Engineering Chapter, you will develop your skills alongside peers and rotate between squads based on business priorities
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Analytics Engineering Chapter with a centre-of-excellence BI team and squad-based rotation model signals a mature, specialised data organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: Deliver the migration of business-critical dashboards to Looker, rebuilding and modelling in LookML to ensure a clean, reliable transition
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific migration scope, named tools (dbt, Looker, LookML, BigQuery), and team structure show precisely what the role involves day to day.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: turn raw data into trusted, self-service insight that business users across IG can act on
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is internal self-service analytics consumers and the BI platform itself, not a single external-facing function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Translate business requirements from stakeholders across functions into efficient, trusted data models
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: This is an individual contributor role executing squad-assigned priorities and translating requirements rather than setting direction.
evidence.ai_role: Contribute to the development of AI agents, co-pilots, and automated insights that surface data directly to users
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate builds data models and infrastructure that downstream AI agents and co-pilots consume, making this AI-enabler work.
evidence.testing_framing: Safeguard data integrity through robust testing frameworks, documentation, and data quality practices
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing frameworks are explicitly framed as an owned responsibility using the strong verb 'safeguard'.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Safeguard data integrity through robust testing frameworks, documentation, and data quality practices
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: regulated FinTech trading platform combined with repeated data-integrity and trust language for business-critical dashboards.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: build the data models that power IG's next-generation analytics platform and to deliver the technical migration of our business-critical dashboards to Looker
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building a next-generation platform and migrating/rebuilding existing business-critical dashboards.
evidence.loss_aversion: As a publicly-traded FinTech trading platform, the JD repeatedly emphasises data integrity, trust, and reliability for business-critical dashboards.
